PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const f='E:/Download E drive/lux living project 2026 final/js/data.js';let s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const find=\\", 'assets/shop/three2/08.jpg'], desc: 'Camel leather three-, two- and single-seaters\\";const rep=\\"], desc: 'Camel leather three-, two- and single-seaters\\";if\(!s.includes\(find\)\){console.log\('NOT FOUND'\);process.exit\(1\)}s=s.replace\(find,rep\);fs.writeFileSync\(f,s\);eval\(s.replace\('window.LUX','globalThis.LUX'\)\);const crypto=require\('crypto'\);const root='E:/Download E drive/lux living project 2026 final/';const own={};let bad=0;for\(const p of LUX._products\(\)\){for\(const i of p.imgs\){const h=crypto.createHash\('md5'\).update\(fs.readFileSync\(root+i\)\).digest\('hex'\);if\(own[h]&&own[h]!==p.id\){bad++;console.log\('DUPE',p.id,own[h],i\)}own[h]=p.id}}console.log\('products:',LUX._products\(\).length,'cross-product dupes:',bad\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const crypto=require\('crypto'\);const src=fs.readFileSync\('E:/Download E drive/lux living project 2026 final/js/data.js','utf8'\);eval\(src.replace\('window.LUX','globalThis.LUX'\)\);const root='E:/Download E drive/lux living project 2026 final/';const own={};let bad=0;for\(const p of LUX._products\(\)\){for\(const i of p.imgs\){const h=crypto.createHash\('md5'\).update\(fs.readFileSync\(root+i\)\).digest\('hex'\);if\(own[h]&&own[h]!==p.id\){bad++;console.log\('DUPE',p.id,'vs',own[h]\)}own[h]=p.id}}const ids=LUX._products\(\).map\(p=>p.id\);console.log\('cross-product duplicate images:',bad\);console.log\('camden removed:',!ids.includes\('camden-loveseat'\)\);console.log\('pearl pair added:',ids.includes\('pearl-recliner-pair'\)\)")
